text_block_list.text:
Narita Brian is selected to be Umamusume of the
Year.

Past winners will also be at the award ceremony.
It could be good to speak with such seasoned
racers, but maybe it's still too early for her...

Should we look to rub shoulders with the
strongest racers or not? This important decision
will affect her future.
choice_data_list:
You want to face off with the best, so let's
attend!
Maybe it's a little too soon.

text_block_list.text:
We decide to attend. Together, we head to the
arena where the strongest gather!

We decide not to attend. She claims she is still
just a competitor, so we fix our sights solely on
helping her become a stronger runner.
